name: CurveDisplay
description: Custom viewport preview (lineweight, color, dash) for curves — CPython SDK-mode port of CRC_CurveDisplay.

inputParameters.name: colours
inputParameters.description: Color per curve (last value repeats for remaining curves)

inputParameters.name: widths
inputParameters.description: Lineweight per curve in pixels (last value repeats)

inputParameters.name: dashes
inputParameters.description: Dash pattern per curve: space-separated dash/gap values (e.g. '2 1'); last value repeats
